name: Conditional Control (While Loop)
description: Executes actions while conditions are true - like a while loop with sensor conditions
author: NISystem

while_true_actions.description: Actions to execute while condition is TRUE

while_false_actions.description: Actions to execute while condition is FALSE

published_tags.name: py.Condition_Duration
published_tags.description: How long current state has been held

code:
# Conditional Control (While Loop)
# Executes different actions based on whether condition is true/false
# Example: While Temperature < 60, keep Heater ON

import time

cond_tag = config.get('condition_tag', 'Temperature_1')
operator = config.get('condition_operator', '<')
cond_value = config.get('condition_value', 60)
true_actions = config.get('while_true_actions', [])
false_actions = config.get('while_false_actions', [])
enabled = config.get('enabled', True)

# Initialize state
if 'last_condition' not in state:
    state['last_condition'] = None
    state['state_start_time'] = time.time()

if not enabled:
    publish('py.Condition_Met', 0)
    publish('py.Condition_Duration', 0)
else:
    # Get current value
    current_value = tags.get(cond_tag, 0)
    
    # Evaluate condition
    operators = {
        '<': lambda a, b: a < b,
        '<=': lambda a, b: a <= b,
        '>': lambda a, b: a > b,
        '>=': lambda a, b: a >= b,
        '==': lambda a, b: a == b,
        '!=': lambda a, b: a != b
    }
    
    op_func = operators.get(operator, operators['<'])
    condition_met = op_func(current_value, cond_value)
    
    # Track state changes
    if condition_met != state['last_condition']:
        state['last_condition'] = condition_met
        state['state_start_time'] = time.time()
    
    duration = time.time() - state['state_start_time']
    
    # Execute appropriate actions
    if condition_met:
        for action in true_actions:
            output_tag = action.get('output', '')
            output_value = action.get('value', False)
            if output_tag:
                output(output_tag, output_value)
    else:
        for action in false_actions:
            output_tag = action.get('output', '')
            output_value = action.get('value', False)
            if output_tag:
                output(output_tag, output_value)
    
    publish('py.Condition_Met', 1 if condition_met else 0)
    publish('py.Condition_Duration', duration)
